name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers car title loans and unsecured lines of credit with same-day cash, accepting most credit types at stores across multiple states.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending companies in the United States, with a broad network of store locations. The Memphis TN 9 branch on Summer Avenue has operated continuously since February 2007, making it a long-established presence in the community. The company serves borrowers both in-store and online, with physical locations concentrated in the South and Midwest.

The company offers two primary product lines. The first is a title pledge and flex line of credit: borrowers pledge their clear vehicle title as collateral to access a secured loan or revolving line of credit, while retaining use of the vehicle throughout the loan term. The flex structure allows withdrawals up to the credit limit incrementally rather than as a single lump sum. The second product is an unsecured flexible line of credit, available in-store and online in a limited set of states — AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI — requiring proof of an active bank account and income rather than any collateral.

A few features distinguish this location from generic title lenders. The Summer Avenue store is explicitly bilingual, which is meaningful for Spanish-speaking borrowers in Memphis. Despite performing a credit check, TitleMax accepts most credit types because the vehicle title provides security for the loan. The store has accumulated over 481 Google reviews with a 5.00/5 average rating, with multiple reviewers citing specific staff members by name for professionalism and transparency — an unusually strong review record for a subprime lending storefront. The flex line structure is also less common in the title lending space and gives repeat borrowers more liquidity management options.

Title loans are among the most expensive forms of consumer credit available. TitleMax does not publish APR figures on the store page, which is typical of the industry but limits meaningful cost comparison before applying. Borrowers who default face repossession of their vehicle — a serious consequence when transportation is essential for employment. This product is best treated as a last-resort bridge for short-term emergencies when lower-cost alternatives (credit union PALs, employer advances, personal loans) are unavailable or have been exhausted. Anyone with access to a bank or credit union personal loan should compare total cost before proceeding.
pros: Same-day cash disbursement on title pledge loans
Flex line of credit allows incremental withdrawals up to credit limit rather than lump-sum only
Bilingual staff available at the Memphis Summer Avenue location
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle while the title loan is active
Unsecured personal line of credit available online — no vehicle required
Most credit types accepted; vehicle title supplements credit check
5.00/5 average rating across 481+ Google reviews with staff named repeatedly for professionalism
cons: APR rates not disclosed on the store page — cost comparison requires a full application
Vehicle repossession is the consequence of default on title pledge loans
Online unsecured line of credit restricted to 11 states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Clear vehicle title required — borrowers with existing liens cannot use the title product
Closed Sundays; reduced hours Tue–Thu and Saturdays
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear title who need emergency cash quickly and have limited credit options
Borrowers with poor or thin credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Memphis area needing bilingual loan assistance
Existing customers who want revolving access to credit via the flex line structure
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for borrowers who own their vehicle outright, need cash the same day, and cannot qualify for lower-cost credit products. The main caveat is that title loans are high-cost secured debt — defaulting means losing your vehicle — and rates are not disclosed upfront, making it difficult to compare costs before applying.
services: Car title pledge loans (secured by vehicle title)
Online unsecured personal line of credit (select states)
Credit checks with acceptance of most credit types
Incremental credit withdrawals up to approved limit
